chatParticipant.description: Refine a change request against Harness Runner project constraints, then auto-send the final prompt to Copilot Chat.
chatParticipant.command.harnessSpec.desc: Polish a request with the merged Harness Runner project constraints, then auto-send the ready-to-use final version to Copilot Chat.
configuration.title: Harness Runner
configuration.maxAutonomousLoops.descrip: Maximum number of stories to execute continuously before pausing a run.
configuration.loopDelayMs.description: Delay between execution loops in milliseconds.
configuration.copilotResponsePollMs.desc: Polling interval in milliseconds for checking whether Copilot is idle.
configuration.copilotTimeoutMs.descripti: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for Copilot to finish a story. Defaults to 1 hour.
configuration.copilotMinWaitMs.descripti: Minimum time in milliseconds to wait before checking whether Copilot started working on a story.
configuration.autoInjectProjectConstrain: Automatically inject initialized project constraints when building task prompts.
configuration.autoInjectDesignContext.de: Automatically inject recorded UI design context when building task prompts.
configuration.autoRecallTaskMemory.descr: Automatically recall related task memory before execution and inject a bounded amount of prior context.
configuration.autoCommitGit.description: When enabled and a Git repository is detected, Harness Runner asks Copilot to complete the story-scoped Git commit directly instead of creating a separate Git-commit story.
configuration.recalledTaskMemoryLimit.de: Maximum number of related task-memory entries to inject or preview for each story.
configuration.policyGates.markdownDescri: Automatic policy rules. When enabled, Harness Runner checks the configured preflight and completion rules before a story starts and before completion is accepted. The `knowledge-check` rule can use Agent Map freshness, module knowledge gaps, and runbook coverage gaps as advisory or blocking signals. Legacy `requireProjectConstraintsBeforeRun` and `requireDesignContextForTaggedStories` settings are still read for compatibility but are no longer shown separately.
configuration.policyGateCommandTimeoutMs: Timeout in milliseconds for policy-gate build, test, or validation commands.
configuration.approvalPromptMode.descrip: Approval prompt mode. Harness Runner reads this value using workspace override first, then falls back to User settings, and keeps using that mode in new Copilot Chat sessions.
configuration.approvalPromptMode.enum.de: Use the workspace override when present; otherwise fall back to User settings. Show an approval notification after a high-risk story completes.
configuration.approvalPromptMode.enum.by: Use the workspace override when present; otherwise fall back to User settings. Open the approval flow directly after a high-risk story completes.
configuration.approvalPromptMode.enum.au: Use the workspace override when present; otherwise fall back to User settings. Do not rely on a pop-up after a high-risk story completes; surface pending approvals through logs, the status bar, and menus.
configuration.enableReviewerLoop.descrip: Whether to enable the Reviewer scoring loop. Harness Runner reads this value using workspace override first, then falls back to User settings. When disabled, execution no longer enters the Reviewer pass or auto-refactor loop.
configuration.reviewPassingScore.descrip: Passing score for the Reviewer loop. Harness Runner reads this value using workspace override first, then falls back to User settings.
configuration.maxAutoRefactorRounds.desc: Maximum number of auto-refactor rounds allowed when a Reviewer score does not pass. Harness Runner reads this value using workspace override first, then falls back to User settings.
configuration.language.description: Switch the Harness Runner runtime language. Reinitialize project constraints afterward if you want language-dependent rules to refresh.
configuration.language.enum.chinese: Use Chinese for runtime UI copy and generate Chinese Git commit rules during project-constraint initialization.
configuration.language.enum.english: Use English for runtime UI copy and generate English Git commit rules during project-constraint initialization.
configuration.rootMenuOrder.markdownDesc: Customize the top-level menu order. Valid values are `planning`, `guides`, `constraints`, `execution`, and `settings`; missing or duplicate values automatically fall back to the default order at runtime.
